name: Peggy's Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 lb beef stew meat or Cut up boneless chuck
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in the oil and onion soup mixture.
2. Add 1 1/2 - 2 cups water to the pot.
3. Cook in a pressure cooker until done, about 40 minutes.
4. Add onions, carrots, and potatoes (you can also add celery).
5. Simmer slowly until vegetables are cooked through, adding water as necessary.
6. Thicken the gravy and serve.
